topics.title: Film Festival Conflict and Martial Arts Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a heated debate over a film festival entry, a discussion on the mechanics of Gracie Jiu-Jitsu versus street fighting, and a critique of Amy Fisher's public appearances.

topics.title: Film Festival Preparations and Production Details
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming film festival, including specific entries like "Benjamin's Courage" and "The Three Faces of Ronnie," while reviewing production footage and coordinating logistics for the event.

topics.title: Impact of Howard Stern's Departure from CBS
topics.summary: The show discusses the decline of CBS radio ratings following Howard Stern's move to satellite, the potential return of Opie and Anthony, and the failure of David Lee Roth's replacement show.

topics.title: Radio Industry Dynamics and Celebrity Media Presence
topics.summary: The studio discusses the career of David Lee Roth, the perceived lack of regulation for Spanish-language radio stations, and the commercial viability of actors like Tom Cruise.

topics.title: Radio Show Interactions and Promotional Segments
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including a flower delivery advertisement, a heated exchange regarding a caller's identity and behavior, a discussion about film festival logistics, and a segment involving the use of performance-enhancing medication.

topics.title: Thalidomide Survivors and Comedy
topics.summary: The show features a comedian born with physical deformities due to thalidomide and discusses his experiences as a performer and survivor of the drug's effects.

topics.title: Thalidomide Awareness and Comedy Segment
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the history of Thalidomide and its impact on birth defects before transitioning into a comedy set involving various jokes and physical stunts.

topics.title: Electric Shock Contest
topics.summary: The studio features a competition where participants endure electric shocks to their genitals while competing for an invitation to a party.

topics.title: Adult Film Stars Perform on Radio
topics.summary: The studio hosts two adult film stars who participate in a segment involving electrical shocks and discuss their careers, personal lives, and upcoming appearances.

topics.title: Film Festival and Movie Reviews
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming film festival events, the production of Beer League, and the role of critics in evaluating comedy films.

topics.title: Upcoming Film Festival and Summer Blockbusters
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming film festival's press coverage, the success of various summer blockbusters like Superman and X-Men, and the intricacies of comic book adaptations.

topics.title: Film Reviews and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses various films including Flight 93 and Walk the Line, critiques recent cinematic trends, and covers celebrity news involving Denise Richards and Charlie Sheen.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Film Festival Logistics
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity rumors involving Denise Richards and Heather Locklear, a series of news items including Paris Hilton's public behavior and Jim Carrey's filming antics, and logistical issues regarding ticket distribution for an upcoming film festival.

topics.title: Film Festival Preparations and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming coverage of the Howard Stern Film Festival, internal office dynamics regarding a prank involving staff members, and reactions to celebrity news concerning a film's box office performance.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The show covers various entertainment topics including the poor box office performance of Basic Instinct 2, legal issues involving Maury Povich, Amy Fisher's drug claims, Jerry Stiller's accident, and updates on American Idol contestants.

topics.title: Current Events and Film Festival Preparations
topics.summary: The studio discusses various news items including celebrity activities, the oil crisis, drug trends in schools, and safety concerns regarding televisions before transitioning into preparations for an upcoming film festival.

topics.title: Shock Treatment and Upcoming Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses the physical aftermath of electric shock stunts, upcoming parties, and personal plans for religious ceremonies.

topics.title: Guest Appearances and Show Promotion
topics.summary: The studio hosts a segment featuring guests Amanda and Heather, who discuss their relationships with the show's personalities and share personal anecdotes before concluding with an announcement of upcoming events.
